text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a display undoubtedly deserving of the
nickname "the Beast," Narita Brian wins the
Kikuka Sho and is crowned Triple Crown
Champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Hishi Amazon has just become Triple
Tiara Champion. The two of them reaffirm their
intentions to battle at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Narita Brian sets her sights on the
Arima Kinen to settle the score with Hishi
Amazon!
